strategy: Write 5 new wishlist articles (hallucination-detection, interpretability, active-learning, transfer-learning, code-generation) with SVG diagrams and cross-links. Add 3 new connections (75-77) to cross-cutting-connections.
reasoning: Coverage mode required writing new articles. Expected composite drop as new articles start below average. Focused on most-referenced wishlist topics to maximize coverage gains.
lesson: 5 new articles moved wishlist from 17.4% to 32.1% (+14.7pp) and combined coverage from 59% to 66% (+7pp). Composite drop of -2.8 is within expected range. New articles scored 71.4-80.7, with transfer-learning and code-generation lowest due to fewer 2026 papers and lower sourcing scores. Next session should either continue coverage or improve the lowest-scoring new articles.
